qas.q: True or False: Commanding Officers may order the emergency destruction of records without regards to statutory and regulatory requirements under two, Specified emergency situations : 1) when a state of war exists or is threatened, or 2) when records menace property health or life.
Electronic records (including e-mail) that are considered official records must be saved within a DoD 5015.2-STD compliant Electronic Records Management (ERM) application or _________________
qas.a: Printed, To include any attachments and e-mail transmissions and receipt data, and filled out corresponding folder within your commands or activitys records management system

qas.q: Which one of the items listed below is a non-record?
qas.a: Duplicate copy of the Microsoft PowerPoint the Commanding General gave to the Commandant of the Marine Corps during his recent visit to base

qas.q: True or False: Best Practices in Record management requires the management of a record throughout its complete lifecyclefrom creation, to maintenance and use, and final dispositions.
Select the correct description of the SECNAV Manual 5210.1.
qas.a: Contains guidelines supporting records lifecycle management and provides DON records disposition schedules by SSIC

qas.q: True or False: Records holds and freezes are lifted after 180 days following receipt of the original notice.
Select the correct description of the Standard form 135 (SF 135),
qas.a: records Transmittal and Receipts, is used to submit retired records to a Federal Records Center (FRC). Also sreves as the commands receipt dor records transferred to FRC.
